services.corporateDesc: Discreet, highly-trained escort services and close-in security for executives and high-profile individuals.

hero.label: Our Story
hero.title: Built on Integrity,
hero.subtitle: Over 40 years of protecting lives and assets across Metro Manila. Highly trained professionals delivering world-class security services.

story.label: The Story
story.title: From Humble Beginnings to Industry Leadership
story.p1: In 1982, our founder, Francisco C. Palacio, and his wife, Dr. Celesdenia Palacio, MD, embarked on a journey in the security industry by establishing the Magilas Security Agency.
story.p2: "From Magilas to Liberty – a transformation that marked our commitment to excellence and innovation in security services." Four years later, in 1986, the company underwent a strategic transformation and became Liberty Investigation & Security Agency Inc.
story.p3: Throughout the years, Liberty has experienced remarkable growth, establishing itself as a respected and trusted security firm in the region. This success is a testament to the unwavering dedication of our highly skilled team.

journey.label: Our Journey
journey.title: Four Decades of Excellence
journey.subtitle: Key milestones that shaped Liberty into the industry leader it is today
journey.y1982desc: Francisco C. Palacio and Dr. Celesdenia Palacio established Magilas Security Agency, marking the start of our legacy.
journey.y1986desc: Rebranded to Liberty Investigation & Security Agency Inc., expanding our services and vision.
journey.y2000desc: Major growth across Metro Manila, incorporating cutting-edge technology and advanced training programs.
journey.y2025desc: Serving 5,000+ clients with a team of highly trained professionals across the Philippines.

faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Here are some of LISAI's frequently asked questions.
faq.a1: It stands for Liberty Investigation & Security Agency, Inc.
faq.a2: LISAI offers manned guarding, investigation, security consultancy, and VIP protection services.
faq.q3: How long has LISAI been in operation?
faq.a3: LISAI has been in the security industry since 1982, with over four decades of experience.
faq.a4: We are located at Suite 302 Eleongsing Bldg., 440 Rizal Ave. Extension, Grace Park, Caloocan City.

hero.label: Our Services
hero.title: Security Solutions
hero.subtitle: From guarding your business premises to protecting high-profile individuals — we offer a full range of professional security services tailored to your needs.

our.label: Our Services
our.title: Our Security
our.subtitle: Every service is designed with one goal in mind — your safety. We match the right team and approach to your specific situation.
our.b1desc: Ensuring the safety of facilities and staff through vigilant property patrols, diligent surveillance equipment monitoring, and thorough inspections of buildings and equipment.
our.b2desc: Highly proficient in protecting company assets — including inventories and stocks — and ensuring the security of vacant properties and buildings by preventing unauthorized entry and squatting.
our.b3desc: Prominent individuals and corporate entities face various threats, from stalkers to protests. Our personal security packages prioritize your well-being, granting you the freedom to pursue your goals confidently.
our.b4desc: Round-the-clock security for corporate offices, residences, and private estates. We use advanced technology and highly trained personnel to ensure the safety and security of your assets and premises.

how.label: Our Process
how.title: How We Get
how.subtitle: A straightforward process from first contact to full deployment — no guesswork, no delays.
how.s1desc: We discuss your specific security needs, concerns, and requirements — no hassle.
how.s2desc: Our team conducts a thorough evaluation of your location to identify vulnerabilities.
how.s3desc: We design a tailored plan and assign the right personnel and equipment for your needs.
how.s4desc: Guards are deployed and operations are continuously monitored for your peace of mind.

industries.label: Who We Serve
industries.title: Industries We Protect
industries.subtitle: Our guards and security personnel are experienced across a wide range of environments and industries, ensuring specialized protection for every sector.

different.label: Why Choose LISAI
different.title: What Makes Our Service Different
different.subtitle: We don't just post a guard and walk away. Every engagement is backed by structured training, proper supervision, and a commitment to your long-term safety.

talk.label: Ready to Get Started?
talk.title: Talk to Our Security Team Today
talk.subtitle: Reach out directly and we'll match you with the right service — no obligation, no runaround. Just a straightforward conversation about protecting what matters to you.

hero.label: Jobs · Training
hero.subtitle: Are you interested in a rewarding career as a security guard? Join our exceptional team and take the first step towards a fulfilling profession.

positions.label: Open Positions
positions.title: We're Hiring
positions.subtitle: We proudly offer comprehensive training programs to equip individuals who aspire to excel in the security industry. No prior experience required for some roles.
positions.p1desc: Open to both male and female applicants. Responsible for protecting client premises, conducting patrols, monitoring surveillance equipment, and maintaining order at assigned posts.
positions.p2desc: Oversees security operations at assigned sites, coordinates with client representatives, and ensures all guards are properly deployed and performing their duties.
positions.p3desc: Supervises a team of security guards during an assigned shift, conducts inspections, submits incident reports, and ensures post orders are followed at all times.
positions.p4desc: Provides administrative and operational support across internal departments. Responsibilities vary by department and may include record-keeping, coordination, financial processing, and communication management.

training.label: Our Training Partner
training.title: Comprehensive Security Training
training.body: We offer comprehensive security education and training to our team members in collaboration with our sister company, Palacio Security Training Academy Inc. Our programs encompass diverse topics — from job responsibilities and theft prevention to crisis response and risk management.
training.c2: Prevention of Theft from Commercial Premises
training.scheduleVal: Batches run regularly — Inquire for next available date
training.locationVal: Suite 302 Eleongsing Bldg, 440 Rizal Ave Ext, Caloocan City

requirements.title: Basic Requirements
requirements.r1: Filipino citizen, male or female, 21–45 years old
requirements.r2: At least high school graduate (Senior High preferred)
requirements.r3: Physically and mentally fit; no criminal record
requirements.r5: Must be able to work in shifting schedules
requirements.r6: Valid NBI Clearance and Barangay Clearance
requirements.b1Desc: Salary aligned with DOLE standards and industry rates
requirements.b2Desc: SOSIA-accredited courses through Palacio Training Academy
requirements.b4Desc: 40+ years of company stability with 5,000+ active guards
requirements.b5Desc: Clear path from guard to supervisor and senior roles
requirements.b6Desc: Assignments across Metro Manila in diverse industries

join.title: Join the LISAI Family
join.subtitle: Be part of a team that has protected lives and assets across Metro Manila for over four decades.

intro.label: Application Process
intro.e1: Fill out a short application form — takes about 3 minutes.
intro.e2: Attach your resume or any relevant documents.
intro.e3: Our HR team will review and reach out within 3–5 business days.
intro.e4: Selected applicants will be invited for an interview.
